title: oncidium × pauwelsii
intro: Oncidium × pauwelsii, also known as the Pauwels' Oncidium, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the intergeneric hybridization of Oncidium and other orchid genera. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Oncidium × pauwelsii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Oncidium × pauwelsii involve drying the plant material to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
